title: hieracium tephrodermum subsp. tephrodermum
intro: Hieracium tephrodermum subsp. tephrodermum is a rare subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the liver and gallbladder, and promote digestion. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including liver and gallbladder problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Hieracium tephrodermum subsp. tephrodermum is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused in oil, to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
